usage: setFillerMode [-help] [-reset] [-add_fillers_with_drc {true|false}] [-avoid_abutment_patterns { 1:1 1:2 ...}] [-check_signal_drc {true|false}] [-check_trim_rule {true|false}] [-core {{list-of-cells1} {list-of-cells2} ...}] [-corePrefix <filler-prefix>] [-createRows {true|false}] [-diffCellViol {true|false}] [-distribute_implant_evenly {true|false}] [-double_height_filler_insertion {true|false}] [-ecoMode {true|false}] [-enable_restore_filler_flow {true|false}] [-fitGap {true|false}] [-honorPrerouteAsObs {true|false}] [-horizontal_exception_cell {fillerCell ...}] [-horizontal_max_length <value>] [-horizontal_repair_cell {fillCell ...}] [-keepFixed {true|false}] [-preserveUserOrder {true|false}] [-scheme {locationFirst|cellFirst}] [-swap_cell {{cell swap pair1} {cell swap pair2} ...}] [-vertical_stack_exception_cell <ListOfCellNames>] [-vertical_stack_left_edge_exception_cell <ListOfCellNames>] [-vertical_stack_max_length <value>] [-vertical_stack_repair_cell {fillerCell ...}] [-vertical_stack_repair_edge {left|right}] [-vertical_stack_right_edge_exception_cell <ListOfCellNames>] [-y_flip_type { integer : { first | last } ... }]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -add_fillers_with_drc
options.description: call second addFiller without drc checking

options.name: -avoid_abutment_patterns
options.description: illegal abutment patterns

options.name: -check_signal_drc
options.description: DRC checking after filler insertion

options.name: -check_trim_rule
options.description: check trim-2-trim rule between cell trim and routing trim.

options.name: -core
options.description: {{list-of-cells1} {list-of-cells2} ...} List of filler cells

options.name: -corePrefix
options.description: Prefix of filler cells

options.name: -createRows
options.description: Create rows for filler cell techSites which do not have rows in the floor plan

options.name: -diffCellViol
options.description: Check violations between different cell types

options.name: -distribute_implant_evenly
options.description: distribute implant evenly for fillers

options.name: -double_height_filler_insertion
options.description: {true|false} enable double height filler during filler insertion.

options.name: -ecoMode
options.description: Fillers inserted in ecoFlow

options.name: -enable_restore_filler_flow
options.description: {true|false} enable restore filler flow.

options.name: -fitGap
options.description: Filler command fit 1-site gap

options.name: -honorPrerouteAsObs
options.description: Filler command honors setPrerouteAsObs value

options.name: -horizontal_exception_cell
options.description: {fillerCell ...} List of exceptional cells for horizontal stack checking

options.name: -horizontal_max_length
options.description: specify instance max length (in micron) aligned in horizontal direction

options.name: -horizontal_repair_cell
options.description: List of filler cells to fix horizontal max length violation

options.name: -keepFixed
options.description: 'FIXED' fillers are kepted

options.name: -preserveUserOrder
options.description: Instruct tool to insert fillers by the user defined order

options.name: -scheme
options.description: Instruct tool to select locationFirst|cellFirst scheme

options.name: -swap_cell
options.description: {{cell swap pair1} {cell swap pair2} ...} swap cell pairs

options.name: -vertical_stack_exception_cell
options.description: <ListOfCellNames> List of exceptional cells for vertical stack checking

options.name: -vertical_stack_left_edge_exception_cell
options.description: <ListOfCellNames> List of cells only check right edge for vertical stack violation

options.name: -vertical_stack_max_length
options.description: specify instance max length (in micron) aligned in vertical direction

options.name: -vertical_stack_repair_cell
options.description: {fillerCell ...} List of filler cells to fix vertical stack violation

options.name: -vertical_stack_repair_edge
options.description: {left|right} specify the edge to use of vertical repair cell

options.name: -vertical_stack_right_edge_exception_cell
options.description: <ListOfCellNames> List of cells only check left edge for vertical stack violation

options.name: -y_flip_type
options.description: { integer : { first | last } ... } Defines first or last cell with certain cell size should be y-flipped
